contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 47
- Description: DApp: shared footer links, mobile inventory holdings, store interaction history (PR #181)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/181
  
  Details:
  ## Time window (this session)
  
  - **Started (UTC):** 2026-04-26T21:07:21Z — aligns with the earliest related commit on `TrueSightDAO/dapp` `main` from this batch (`2d321df`, Inventory Holdings by Manager + nav).
  - **Started (local, PDT):** 2026-04-26 14:07:21 PDT (same instant).
  - **Ended (UTC):** 2026-04-26T21:54:38Z (submission prep; same wall clock as logged minutes below).
  - **Ended (local, PDT):** 2026-04-26 14:54:38 PDT.
  - **Minutes logged for this contribution (Time):** 47 (from 21:07:21Z through 21:54:38Z).
  
  ## What changed (dapp)
  
  - **Shared footer:** `js/dapp_footer_links.js` — every DApp page gets **Reload Latest Version** (`?reload=true`) and **View Source Code** (GitHub `blob/main/<page>.html`); idempotent; service worker precache bump (v7) includes the script.
  - **`view_inventory_holdings.html`:** mobile-friendly layout (safe-area, responsive logo, horizontal scroll for tables, touch-sized controls), plus **double-encoded** `manager_key` / `manager` query normalization.
  - **`repackaging_planner.html`:** restored after accidental bulk strip; footer uses shared script only.
  - **`store_interaction_history.html`:** field-reports timeline category, suggest UI (status pills), optional **Edgar** attachments / paste UX (merged via PR below).
  
  ## GitHub (evidence beyond the PR)
  
  - `main` commits (direct): `6ba3469` (footer links), `4dd3169` (mobile holdings), `4ada550` (menu cache-bust / SW v6), `2d321df` (holdings page + nav).
  - Merged PR: **https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/181** (squash: `bd02efd`).
  
  ## Ops / workflow
  
  - Documented **HTTPS push** path when **SSH** fails (`gh auth setup-git` + `git push https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp.git …`).
  - Opened branch **`feat/store-interaction-history-field-reports-attachments`**, created PR **#181**, squash-merged to `main`.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 78.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
